text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Oh, Trainer. Sorry, am I in the way?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
I thought you might want to look 
at the map, you see. If I'm blocking 
your view, I'll gladly step asi—

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: …Just so we're clear, I thought I might be an obstruction due to my position, not because of the size of my head.
